div1.entryFree:
Map, subst. 1) a picture representing the surface of the earth or any part of it: Merch. I, 1, 19. Tw. III, 2, 85. H4A III, 1, 6. H4A III, 1, 6 H5 IV, 7, 25. Lr. I, 1, 38.
2) any picture or image: showing life's triumph in the m. of death, Lucr. 402. the face, that m. which deep impression bears of hard misfortune, Lucr. 402 thus is his cheek the m. of days outworn, Sonn. 68, 1. and him as for a m. doth Nature store, to show false Art what beauty was of yore, Sonn. 68, 1 thou m. of honour, R2 V, 1, 12. in thy face I see the m. of honour, H6B III, 1, 203. if you see this in the m. of my microcosm, Cor. II, 1, 68. thou m. of woe, that thus dost talk in signs, Tit. III, 2, 12 (cf. Globe). R3 II, 4, 54.
